Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No Appearances.

Defendant Jacob Fobean's request to set aside default.

The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Jacob Fobean's unopposed request to set aside default is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
